lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition. There is significant damage to the exterior and the interior is heavily worn. It has major mechanical issues and requires extensive repairs to be roadworthy.
Mint condition.

Get ready to drive home in a vehicle that looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! This car is in truly mint condition, meticulously maintained and absolutely pristine inside and out. It’s a rare find that offers a like-new driving experience and flawless aesthetics. If you’re looking for perfection, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows moderate wear and tear on the upholstery. The engine is operational but requires regular maintenance. All mechanical components are functional but show signs of age.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. The exterior has significant cosmetic damage, including large dents on several panels, advanced rust spots on the wheel arches, and widespread clear coat failure. Inside, the cabin shows heavy wear with multiple tears in the upholstery, a cracked dashboard, and non-functional electronics. Mechanically, the car requires immediate attention; the engine runs poorly with a steady misfire, there are multiple active fluid leaks, and the transmission exhibits significant slippage. This vehicle is best suited as a project car for a dedicated mechanic or as a source for spare parts.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of regular use over the years. The exterior paint has some fading on the hood and roof, along with a few noticeable door dings and scratches. Inside, the cabin is functional but the upholstery shows significant wear and some staining on the carpets. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, though it will likely require new tires and a brake pads replacement in the near future. It is a solid choice for a budget-conscious buyer looking for a dependable commuter who doesn't mind some cosmetic imperfections.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in showroom condition with meticulous attention to detail. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a history of uncompromising care. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that defies its age, this specimen offers an unparalleled ownership experience.

Hey everyone! Honestly, I’m so excited for whoever gets to take this beauty home. It’s in absolutely incredible shape—seriously, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken so much pride in keeping it spotless and pampered since day one. If you're looking for a ride that’s been truly loved and looks brand new, this is the one. Feel free to reach out with any questions, I'm happy to chat!
This FD3S-generation Mazda RX-7 is a superlative example of rotary engineering, preserved in collector-grade condition. The 13B-REW
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Full service history. Flawless interior and exterior.

Offering a truly exceptional vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car remains in flawless, showroom-quality condition, having been stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage and never exposed to harsh weather. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster with zero imperfections, while the interior features premium leather that still carries a factory-fresh scent and shows no signs of use. Every mechanical component has been maintained to the highest standard, backed by a full folder of documented service records from authorized technicians. From the pristine alloy wheels to the untouched engine bay, every detail has been preserved. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a turn-key masterpiece that drives exactly as it did the day it was delivered.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle maintained to the highest possible standards. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior that retains its original luster. Meticulously inspected and mechanically sound, this automobile offers a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands excellence without compromise. Every detail reflects a commitment to preservation, ensuring a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new.

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen exhibits pristine exterior surfaces and an interior that remains in showroom state, reflecting a legacy of meticulous ownership. Mechanically flawless and aesthetically peerless, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I'm so excited to list this absolute gem of a car! Honestly, it's in such incredible shape, you'd think it just rolled right out of the showroom. I've babied this beauty from day one, and it really shows—the interior is spotless and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for something that's practically brand new without the new-car price tag, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions, I'd love to chat!
Used car. Condition: mint.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Maintenance records included.

Presenting a truly museum-quality specimen that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained by a single owner and kept in a climate-controlled environment its entire life. The exterior paint retains a deep, glass-like luster, free of even the smallest stone chips or swirls, thanks to a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the interior is immaculate; the premium leather remains soft and uncreased, the dashboard is flawless, and the original factory scent persists. Every electronic component functions perfectly, and the engine bay is clean enough to eat off of. Accompanied by a full binder of service records, all original manuals, and both sets of keys, this is an uncompromising example for the most discerning collector.

This exemplary vehicle is presented in showroom-grade condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that borders on the fastidious. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior detail remains in a pristine state, offering an acquisition opportunity for the most discerning professional. Its impeccable provenance is documented, ensuring a seamless transition for its next proprietor.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity that rivals factory-fresh delivery. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a history of meticulous care. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless condition.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute gem of a car, and honestly, it’s in such incredible shape you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been my pride and joy, kept in a climate-controlled garage and pampered every single day. Not a single scratch or dent to be found—it’s truly in mint condition. If you’re looking for a ride that looks and feels brand new, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a torque-sensing limited-slip differential. This example is in museum-grade condition, with a flawless subframe, pristine factory paint, and an interior devoid of typical bolster wear. Every mechanical component, from the rod bearings to the cooling system, has been meticulously maintained to ensure peak performance. A true collector's piece for the purist seeking an unmolested driving experience.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records included. Inspection welcome.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, maintained in showroom condition since day one. The exterior features a flawless, deep-gloss finish protected by a professional ceramic coating, with absolutely zero chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains pristine, retaining that signature new-car scent with supple, hand-treated leather seats that show no signs of creasing or wear. Every mechanical component has been meticulously cared for, backed by a comprehensive, gap-free service history from certified specialists. Always climate-controlled and garaged, and never driven in inclement weather, this car performs exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. It is a rare find for a discerning buyer who demands absolute perfection and a turn-key experience.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, featuring an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects meticulous stewardship. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands an uncompromising level of quality and mechanical integrity, this specimen offers a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of unrivaled caliber.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen has been preserved to the highest standards, exhibiting showroom-quality aesthetics and flawless mechanical integrity. Every detail reflects meticulous ownership and an uncompromising commitment to maintenance. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a vehicle in truly impeccable, investment-grade condition.

Hey there! I’m so excited to share this absolute beauty with you. Honestly, it is in such incredible shape—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been totally pampered and is looking for a new home where it'll be just as loved. You really have to see it in person to believe how pristine it is. It's an absolute dream to drive and ready for its next adventure!

Mint condition. Zero cosmetic flaws. Interior pristine. Fully serviced. Runs perfectly.

This 2021 BMW M2 Competition is a true collector-grade specimen, preserved in absolute showroom condition. Finished in Hockenheim Silver Metallic, the paint is flawless with zero rock chips or swirls, protected by a full-body Paint Protection Film (PPF) and a professional ceramic coating. The interior remains in a pristine state; the Black Dakota leather still retains its original matte finish and that distinct new-car scent, while the bolsters show no signs of entry wear and the carbon fiber trim is free of any scratches. A premier opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands absolute perfection.
